today_in_history_posts.title: {sign|verify}message replacement
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Karl introduces SignatureProof to replace broken message signing tools, excluding legacy 1xx addresses.
- The proposal includes simple implementation in Bitcoin Core with "sign" and "verify" RPC commands.
- Feedback is requested on using VerifyScript with a new signature checker class for validation.

today_in_history_posts.title: New form of 51% attack via lightning's revocation system possible?
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The Lightning Network is vulnerable to a unique 51% attack threatening Bitcoin transactions.
- An attacker could potentially steal up to 99% of bitcoins across connected payment channels.
- Rene Pickhardt suggests eliminating revocation in payment channels as the only prevention method.

today_in_history_posts.title: Unilateral Exit
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Implementing shared non-custodial UTXOs requires a system for unilateral exits without others' consent.
- The use of Merkle trees and cryptographic accumulators has been proposed for efficient on-chain exits.
- A novel opcode, `OP_EXIT`, using accumulators, facilitates efficient and private unilateral exits in shared UTXOs.
